title: Digital Marketing Analyst
description: Caterpillar, the global manufacturing leader, seeks a Digital Marketing Analyst to support our B2B marketing efforts. Working hybrid in Des Moines, you'll analyze digital campaign performance, track marketing metrics, and provide insights that drive strategy. This role combines analytics with exposure to heavy equipment and construction industry marketing.
responsibilities: Track and analyze digital marketing campaign performance across channels
Generate reports on website traffic, lead generation, and conversion metrics
Conduct A/B testing and performance optimization for digital campaigns
Maintain marketing databases and manage campaign data
Collaborate with marketing and sales teams on performance insights
Support SEO and content marketing analytics

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, Analytics, or related field
skills: Google Analytics and marketing analytics tools
Project management and attention to detail
